RT by @NotWoofers: The IRGC has overnight and this morning launched a series of attacks against the Autonomous Region of Kurdistan. The first wave of attacks was aimed at Hawler (Erbil) - several drones were launched to strike sites of the US military within the KRG; the drones were intercepted. Then this morning, the IRGC launched an attack on a camp of the Komala south of Slemani city. 8 Peshmerga of the Komala have been martyred, 13 others are wounded and at least 1 Peshmerga has succumbed to his wounds. This marks a major escalation in the attacks by the IRGC against Kurdish forces from Rojhelat. The IRGC has again implemented its strategy of units that operate autonomously - pre designated sites are being struck at will, without orders from the IRGC command structure. These units use drones from hidden storage sites.
